title: dianthus siculus subsp. stellaris
intro: Dianthus siculus subsp. stellaris, also known as the Greek carnation, is a plant species within the Dianthus genus. It is a perennial herb native to Greece, valued for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant contains flavonoids and other compounds, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Dianthus siculus subsp. stellaris may include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of colds and respiratory issues.
